Description: Three corn tortillas with choice of al pastor, carnitas, or chicken, served with cilantro rice and refried beans
Large flour tortilla stuffed with slow-cooked carnitas, rice, beans, pico, and cheese, served with chips and salsa
Three rolled corn enchiladas with red sauce, topped with queso fresco, served with rice and beans
Two handmade tamales (pork or chicken) with rice, beans, and salsa verde on the side
Grilled skirt steak sliced thin, served with grilled onions, rice, beans, and warm tortillas
Grilled flour tortilla with peppers, onions, mushrooms, and melted cheese, served with rice and beans
Two small flour tortillas with seasoned chicken or ground beef, rice, and a side of applesauce
Roasted corn off the cob with mayo, cotija, chili powder, and lime
House-made tortilla chips with fresh guacamole, serves 10 to 12 people per tray
Cilantro rice and refried beans, serves 15 to 20 people per tray
Traditional horchata made with rice, cinnamon, and vanilla, serves approximately 16 cups
Hibiscus flower tea sweetened with cane sugar and lime, serves approximately 16 cups
Fried dough rolled in cinnamon sugar, served with chocolate dipping sauce
Sponge cake soaked in three milks, topped with whipped cream and fresh strawberries, serves 20 to 24
